summary: Dashboard Overhaul Testing Complete. All 20 tests PASSED. The new ML monitoring dashboard features work correctly: 5 stat cards, 3 quick insight cards, Dataset Health widget with readiness indicator, Model Leaderboard, 3 Recharts charts (Model Performance bar, Algorithm Usage pie, Training Timeline line), and Recent Models table with all required columns.
passed_tests: TEST 1: EMPTY STATE - Dashboard shows 'No Models Trained Yet' message with 'Train Your First Model' button - PASSED
TEST 2: EMPTY STATE - Click 'Train Your First Model' button navigates to Analysis tab - PASSED
TEST 3: TRAIN A MODEL - House Prices dataset loaded, target 'price' selected, training completed successfully with Linear/Ridge Regression as best model - PASSED
TEST 4: DASHBOARD AFTER TRAINING - 5 stat cards appear: Total Models (1), Avg Score (99.9%), Best Algorithm (Ridge Regression), Highest Score (99.9%), Last Training - PASSED
TEST 5: QUICK INSIGHTS - 3 quick insight cards appear: Best Performing, Most Used, Highest Accuracy (data-testid='quick-insights') - PASSED
TEST 6: DATASET HEALTH WIDGET - Widget found (data-testid='dataset-health-widget') with readiness indicator - PASSED
TEST 7: DATASET HEALTH WIDGET - Health score badge shows number out of 100 (e.g., 67/100) (data-testid='health-score') - PASSED
TEST 8: DATASET HEALTH WIDGET - Rows, columns, missing values, outliers displayed (data-testid='scan-rows', 'scan-cols', 'scan-missing', 'scan-outliers') - PASSED
TEST 9: MODEL LEADERBOARD - Top Models panel shows trained models (data-testid='model-leaderboard', 'top-model-0') - PASSED
TEST 10: MODEL PERFORMANCE CHART - Bar chart renders (data-testid='model-performance-chart') - PASSED
TEST 11: ALGORITHM USAGE CHART - Pie chart renders (data-testid='algorithm-usage-chart') - PASSED
TEST 12: TRAINING TIMELINE - Line chart renders (data-testid='training-timeline') - PASSED
TEST 13: RECENT MODELS TABLE - Table shows with columns: Algorithm, Problem Type, Target, Eval Mode, Score, Date (data-testid='recent-models-table') - PASSED
TEST 14: RECENT MODELS TABLE - First row has correct data (data-testid='recent-model-row-0') showing algorithm name, problem type, target, eval mode, score, date - PASSED
TEST 15: TRAIN SECOND MODEL - Loan Approval dataset loaded, target 'approved' selected, training completed successfully - PASSED
TEST 16: DASHBOARD UPDATES - Total Models now shows 2 - PASSED
TEST 17: LEADERBOARD UPDATE - Model Leaderboard shows 2 models (top-model-0, top-model-1) with scores - PASSED
TEST 18: RECENT TABLE UPDATE - Recent Models table shows 2 rows (recent-model-row-0, recent-model-row-1) - PASSED
TEST 19: DATASET HEALTH SCAN - Loading Insurance Costs updates Dashboard scan (Rows: 20, Columns: 7, Outliers: 2) - PASSED
TEST 20: DATASET READINESS - Readiness indicator shows 'Dataset Ready for Training' with 84/100 score - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard overhaul is complete and fully functional
5 stat cards implemented: Total Models, Avg Score, Best Algorithm, Highest Score, Last Training
3 quick insight cards showing Best Performing, Most Used, Highest Accuracy algorithms
Dataset Health widget correctly displays scan results (rows, columns, missing values, outliers) with health score 0-100
Readiness indicator shows 'Dataset Ready for Training' or 'Dataset Needs Cleaning' based on score threshold
Model Leaderboard (Top 5) correctly ranks models by performance score
Model Performance bar chart uses Recharts BarChart with colored bars per algorithm
Algorithm Usage pie chart uses Recharts PieChart showing training frequency per algorithm
Training Timeline line chart shows cumulative model count over time
Recent Models table shows latest 10 models with columns: Algorithm, Problem Type, Target, Eval Mode, Score, Date
Empty state correctly shows when no models trained with CTA button to Analysis tab
All data-testid attributes implemented for robust automated testing
scanDataset function correctly analyzes CSV data for health metrics
Dashboard state updates dynamically when navigating from Analysis after training
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: House Prices (regression - 15 rows, target=price), Loan Approval (classification - 20 rows, target=approved), Insurance Costs (20 rows, 7 columns)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard overhaul fully verified. Key data-testids: dashboard-view, train-first-model-btn, stat-card-*, stat-value-*, quick-insights, insight-best, insight-most-used, insight-highest, dataset-health-widget, dataset-readiness, health-score, scan-rows, scan-cols, scan-missing, scan-outliers, model-leaderboard, top-model-0 through top-model-4, model-performance-chart, algorithm-usage-chart, training-timeline, recent-models-table, recent-model-row-*. Dataset Health widget uses scanDataset function which analyzes csvText state. Health score is calculated based on missing values, duplicates, outliers, constant columns, correlations, dataset size. Readiness threshold is score >= 50. App is 100% client-side with localStorage persistence for models.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All Dashboard overhaul features working correctly
